title: Instagram Running Influencer Email Extractor
description: Discovers Instagram usernames from hashtags using a managed hashtag scraper, then checks profiles and linked websites for emails.

hashtags.title: Seed hashtags (start with 5)
hashtags.description: Starting hashtags. The actor auto-discovers related ones up to maxHashtags total.

maxHashtags.title: Max total hashtags (seeds + auto-discovered)
maxHashtags.description: 5 seeds typically expand to 50+ related tags. Set to 50 for a balanced run.

maxPagesPerHashtag.title: Discovery depth per hashtag
maxPagesPerHashtag.description: When managed hashtag scraping is enabled, this is multiplied by 30. Use 67 for ~2,000 hashtag posts per hashtag, or 100 for ~3,000.

useManagedHashtagScraper.title: Use managed hashtag scraper
useManagedHashtagScraper.description: Uses a separate Apify hashtag scraper actor to discover post owner usernames instead of relying on Instagram's unstable private pagination endpoints.

hashtagScraperActorId.title: Managed hashtag scraper actor ID
hashtagScraperActorId.description: Actor used for hashtag discovery. It must return ownerUsername or an equivalent username field.

minFollowers.title: Minimum follower count
minFollowers.description: Only save profiles with at least this many followers.

maxResults.title: Maximum results to save
maxResults.description: Stop saving after this many qualifying profiles.
